name: claude-code-lens
description: Local monitor for Claude Code API traffic, logs, prompts, and tools

scripts.check: node --check bin/cclens.js && node --check src/cli/service.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/config/target-discovery.js && node --check src/proxy/config.js && node --check src/proxy/server.js && node --check src/visualizer/server.js && node --check src/visualizer/lead-subagent-trace.js && node --check src/visualizer/public/parser-core.js && node --check src/visualizer/public/parser.js && node --check src/visualizer/public/trace-markdown-builder.js && node --check src/visualizer/public/markdown-export-helpers.js && node --check src/visualizer/public/download-current-log.js && node --check src/extractor/index.js && node --check src/extractor/cli.js && node --check src/trace/index.js && node --check src/trace/summary.js && node --check src/trace/markdown-export.js && node --check src/trace/cli.js
